package.name: nl_nav2_executor
package.description: Executes an LLM-generated natural-language waypoint plan on ROS2 Nav2: resolves named warehouse locations to map poses and drives a TurtleBot3 through them in a Gazebo warehouse, honouring per-step on_blocked contingencies (abort / skip / reroute_perimeter / wait_retry). Execution half of the PDE4445 dissertation pipeline.
